title: santalum crassifolium
intro: Santalum crassifolium, also known as the Queensland sandalwood, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Santalaceae. The medicinal properties of Santalum crassifolium include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Santalum crassifolium include essential oils, extracts, and powders, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
